description: Crediwatch is a credit risk intelligence and analytics company that provides business credit assessment, monitoring, and related data products for lenders and businesses. Its public website describes products such as enhanced credit reports, early warning systems, and trust scoring.
summary: Crediwatch exposes one known public HTTP API surface: the Covid APIs at `https://api-covid.crediwatch.com`, with an OpenAPI spec published via APIs.guru; no GraphQL, MCP, CLI, or additional public developer surfaces were found.
